# BUILD SPEC ‚Äî #630 two-layer routing-surface generation seam (n1-plan, line-verified)

GROUND STATE (post-#636, verified): fences already live ‚Äî `<!-- PIN: teammate-mode -->` on 3 plan-run COMMANDS (commands/kaola-workflow-plan-run.md:186), `<!-- PIN: codex-dispatch -->` on 3 plan-run SKILLs (SKILL.md:74), `<!-- PIN: join-protocol -->` skill (SKILL.md:101) vs `<!-- CARD: join-protocol -->` command (:211). In validators: #606 teammate already command-only (validate-workflow-contracts.js:975-983), #611-fork already SKILL-only (:1006-1015), join-protocol split (:1026-1032 skill, :1042-1046 command). In test-route-reachability.js: T5b SKILL-only (:184-216), T14 command-only (:450-463). BUILD ON TOP ‚Äî do NOT re-fence.
Cites: RR=test-route-reachability.js; VW=validate-workflow-contracts.js; VK=validate-kaola-workflow-contracts.js; VGL/VGT=gitlab/gitea validators. 6 surfaces/topic = 3 commands (Claude) + 3 SKILLs (Codex).

## SECTION 1 ‚Äî Layer-1 manifest (templates/routing/required-blocks.js)
Record: `{block_id, topic:'plan-run'|'finalize'|'next', runtime_tag:'claude-live'|'codex-live'|'both', surface_type_tag:'command'|'skill'|'both', content_tokens:[distinctive substrings]}`. Export `{REQUIRED_BLOCKS:[...], TOPICS:['plan-run','finalize','next']}`.
TAG SEMANTICS (both load-bearing): claude-live‚üπcommand surfaces only; codex-live‚üπskill surfaces only; both‚üπfollow surface_type_tag. Tags must be consistent (claude-live must not carry surface_type_tag=skill ‚Üí orphan-manifest red). FIRST content_token of a marker-bearing block = its semantic marker (matched by reverse orphan-sentinel). Tokens matched via norm() = `String(s).replace(/\s+/g,' ')` on both sides (reuse RR:24). Every token is a VERBATIM substring of the current committed surface.

### RESIDUAL additive T-pins ‚Äî KEEP the existing assertions, do NOT fold (¬ß1.3):

## SECTION 2 ‚Äî derived-universe presence checker (ADD to test-route-reachability.js, ADDITIVE-SUPERSET; T1..T15 stay byte-for-byte)
PURE fn: `checkManifest({blocks, readSurface, editions, topicBasename}) -> {failures:[], obligatedCount}` ‚Äî no fs/exit; readSurface(rel)->string|null injected (real: fs+exists; test: in-memory map). editions from existing claudeEditions/codexEditions (RR:54-63). 
2.2 obligated-file derivation (COMPUTED never hand-typed): surface types from runtime_tag (claude-live‚Üí{command}, codex-live‚Üí{skill}, both‚Üíexpand surface_type_tag); assert tag consistency (mismatch‚Üíorphan red). basename per surface type: command {plan-run:stripSlash(schema.PLAN_RUN_COMMAND), finalize:'kaola-workflow-finalize', next:'workflow-next'}; skill {plan-run:schema.PLAN_RUN_SKILL, finalize:'kaola-workflow-finalize', next:'kaola-workflow-next'}. plan-run basenames READ FROM SCHEMA REGISTRY (schema.PLAN_RUN_COMMAND/PLAN_RUN_SKILL, imported RR:29) = the "derived from T1/T2 emitted-targets" anchor (a rename/7th edition follows automatically). Cross with 3 editions ‚Üí command:`${claudeCommandDirs[ed]}/${cmd}.md`, skill:`${codexSkillDirs[ed]}/${skill}/SKILL.md`.
2.3 presence: for each obligated file f + token: readSurface(f)===null‚Üífail(absent); !norm(content).includes(norm(token))‚Üífail(missing token). Obligated set COMPUTED so 4-of-6 by omission is structurally impossible.
2.4 bidirectional orphan-sentinel: FORWARD (empty derived set / bad tag ‚Üí orphan-manifest red); REVERSE (scan every in-scope surface = PR√ó6‚à™FN√ó6‚à™NX√ó6 for `<!-- PIN: -->`/`<!-- CARD: -->` via one regex; each marker MUST have a manifest block whose FIRST content_token == that marker AND obligated set includes that surface; else orphan-surface red ‚Äî catches R2 self-disarm).
2.5 append after T15 (before final `if(failed)` RR:489), reuse module passed/failed/assert, same single exit code.
2.6 SUPERSET PROOF (distinct self-test): enumerate legacy in-scope (token, obligated-legacy-surface-set) pairs for T4-half/T5/T5b/T6/T7-half/T8/T9/T10-half/T12/T13-half/T14/T15 + finalize #624/closure/bundle/final-validation; for each assert ‚àÉ block B with token‚ààB.content_tokens AND derived(B)‚äálegacy-set, OR on RESIDUAL_ALLOWLIST (¬ß1.3 a-f). Any legacy token neither folded nor allow-listed ‚Üí red. Covers #624-fix gate flags + workflow_path:adaptive explicitly (fn-gate-barrier over FN√ó6 ‚äá legacy).

## SECTION 3 ‚Äî T3-style RED-PROOF battery (self-test, in-memory fixtures, NO real-tree mutation; model on RR:104-119)
Harness: expectRed(label,{blocks,surfaces,editions,topicBasename}) asserts checkManifest(...).failures.length>0. Use 1-edition synthetic editions + 1-topic. 6 cases: (1) DROPPED block (surface present, token removed‚Üíred); (2) HOLLOWED (marker kept, 2nd token dropped‚Üíred ‚Äî proves markers-alone insufficient); (3) NEW-SURFACE-MISSING (add 2nd synthetic edition y whose file absent; both-block obligates it‚Üíred ‚Äî proves auto-obligation); (4) ORPHAN-MANIFEST (claude-live+surface_type_tag=skill inconsistent‚Üíred); (5) ORPHAN-SURFACE (`<!-- PIN: rogue -->` no matching block‚Üíreverse-sentinel red); (6) SUPERSET-PROOF (legacy pair (needle,{cmd/foo.md}) no block carries needle + not allow-listed‚Üíred). Green real tree + green fixtures = by-construction acceptance.

## SECTION 4 ‚Äî Layer-2 generator (plan-run + next ONLY, 12 surfaces; finalize NOT generated)
Files: scripts/generate-routing-surfaces.js (engine + --check/--write CLI); templates/routing/{plan-run,next}.skeleton.md; templates/routing/slots.js; templates/routing/rename-table.js; scripts/test-generate-routing-surfaces.js (engine self-test).
4.2 skeleton = union structure with directives on own lines as HTML comments: `<!-- SLOT:frontmatter -->`, `<!-- SLOT:h1 -->`, `<!-- SLOT:setup-resolver -->`, `<!-- REGION:command -->‚Ä¶<!-- /REGION -->`, `<!-- REGION:skill -->‚Ä¶<!-- /REGION -->`, `<!-- SPLICE:name -->`. Generator walks lines: SLOT‚Üíresolved text; REGION:command|skill‚Üíemit body only for that surface_type else drop whole region incl its newline; SPLICE‚Üíinline scoped substitution; forge-noun tokens‚Üírename table. NEWLINE FIDELITY load-bearing (regions authored so dropping leaves exact byte layout).
4.3 slot kinds (grounded): (1) frontmatter 2-shape: command `description:`+`argument-hint:`, skill `name:`+`description:` (plan-run skill desc has `Mirror of commands/kaola-workflow-plan-run.md for Codex runtime.` tail); (2) H1: command `# Kaola-Workflow Plan Run`/`# Workflow Next - thin router`, skill `# Skill: kaola-workflow-plan-run`/`# Kaola-Workflow Next`; (3) setup-resolver runtime slot (whole bash block: command kaola_script(){} + KAOLA_SCRIPTS=$(dirname...) + kaola-workflow/{project}/; skill KAOLA_SCRIPTS="plugins/kaola-workflow/scripts" + find $HOME/.codex... + process.env.KAOLA_PROJECT; next differs --runtime claude vs codex); (4) runtime-conditional whole-section REGIONs ‚Äî command-only: `## Agent Model Badge` (:26-34), `#### Teammate-Mode Dispatch` (:186-209), CARD:join-protocol command (:211-216), github-command run-chains bash-fence; skill-only: `## Dispatch` (:72-97), `## Codex Join Protocol` (:99-153), next-skill `## Delegation Contract`/`## Goal Contract`/`## Autonomy Policy`/`## Codex Dispatch Mode Detection` (:10-63,263-284); STRUCTURAL-REORDER (plan-run): "Dispatch fidelity ‚Äî concurrent dispatch is the DEFAULT" para under step2 command (:156-166) vs under CARD:frontier-batch step4 skill (:404-414) ‚Üí two position-distinct REGIONs; routing-table surface-type slot (next): command /kaola-workflow-phaseN vs skill kaola-workflow-execute/-review/-ideation/-plan/-research; (5) forge-noun slots (¬ß4.4); (6) sub-sentence SPLICEs ‚â•2: synth-floor `a reasoning-class **Opus**-floor synthesizer` cmd:308 ‚Üî `a reasoning-class (non-lowerable floor) synthesizer` SKILL:329; all-done route tail `route to /kaola-workflow-finalize {project}` cmd ‚Üî `route to kaola-workflow-finalize`/`delegate to kaola-workflow-finalize {project}` skill; BUILDER MUST re-grep for more mid-sentence divergences (--check surfaces any missed).
4.4 rename-table.js (per-script keyed by github name): adaptive-node `kaola-workflow-adaptive-node.js`‚Üí`kaola-{gitlab,gitea}-workflow-adaptive-node.js` (verified cmd/skill many lines); **resolve-agent-model `kaola-workflow-resolve-agent-model.js` STAYS UN-RENAMED all 3 commands :33 ‚Äî design invariant**; RUN-CHAINS = surface_type√óforge STRUCTURAL variant NOT rename: only github plan-run COMMAND uses `node "$KAOLA_SCRIPTS/kaola-workflow-run-chains.js" --project {project}` bash fence (:403); gitlab/gitea commands + all 3 SKILLs use prose one-liner ``Run `run-chains.js` with `--project {project}`.`` ‚Üí encode as (surface_type√óforge)-keyed REGION variant. Also forge-invariant (verify in ¬ß4.6): claim.js/roadmap.js/repair-state.js/codex-preflight.js (byte-compare loop authoritative).
4.5 --check/--write: GENERATED_SURFACES registry `{topic,surface_type,forge,path,skeleton}` for the 12 (path computed identically to ¬ß2.2 ‚Äî single source). --write renders+writes; --check renders in-memory + byte-compares + minimal diff + exit(1); no args = --check. Engine self-test drives synthetic skeleton asserting REGION-drop/SLOT-fill/SPLICE/rename each produce expected bytes.
4.6 **CRITICAL: byte-for-byte no-op on first run.** Skeletons+slots+rename REVERSE-ENGINEERED from the current 12 committed surfaces: iterate --write‚Üígit diff‚Üíadjust until git diff EMPTY for all 12; then --check green zero-change first run. **Do NOT add an @generated in-file banner** (current surfaces have none; a banner breaks byte-identity). @generated status recorded out-of-band in GENERATED_SURFACES + docs/conventions.md, enforced by --check in all 4 chains.

## SECTION 5 ‚Äî n4-generate + n5-reconcile
5.1 12 @generated surfaces: PR√ó6 (commands/kaola-workflow-plan-run.md + gitlab/gitea twins + 3 SKILLs) + NX√ó6 (commands/workflow-next.md [basename workflow-next NOT kaola-workflow-next] + gitlab/gitea twins + 3 kaola-workflow-next SKILLs). n4 --write leaves all 12 BYTE-UNCHANGED first run.
5.2 package.json wiring: add `node scripts/generate-routing-surfaces.js --check` + `node scripts/test-generate-routing-surfaces.js` into ALL FOUR chains (package.json:37-40): claude:37 alongside test-route-reachability/validate-workflow-contracts; codex:38/gitlab:39/gitea:40 append the same --check (self-test may run once in claude; --check byte-guard in ALL FOUR so a forge-tree drift reds its own chain); keep --check AFTER any edition-sync.js --check on gitlab/gitea.
5.3 finalize (n5) Layer-1 ONLY, no byte-gen: add the 5 fn blocks to required-blocks.js (checker obligates FN√ó6); KEEP every existing finalize pin ‚Äî do NOT relax the #624 four-gate flags + workflow_path:adaptive (VW:525-528,864;VK:647;VGL:369-395;VGT:376-396), closure-audit, bundle/final-validation/sink pins, and especially the deliberate mr|pr) gitlab/gitea finalize-sink pins (VGL:296,335;VGT:303,342) ‚Äî CONTRACT not drift, manifest is additive over them. Finalize 2:1 rewrite ‚Üí byte-gen out of scope; accepted residual (present-but-wrong prose outside pinned tokens) documented in the design doc.
5.4 docs: docs/conventions.md ¬ß Routing/adaptive prose ‚Äî record PR√ó6+NX√ó6 generated (edit templates/routing/, run generate-routing-surfaces.js --write, never hand-edit), FN√ó6 manifest-guarded hand-authored, manifest = single-source presence contract. CHANGELOG [Unreleased].

## SECTION 6 ‚Äî scheduling
n2-manifest + n4-generate + n5-reconcile all write the shared contract-surface set (test-route-reachability.js, the 4 validate-*-contracts.js, byte mirror plugins/kaola-workflow/scripts/validate-workflow-contracts.js, package.json) ‚Üí ONE serialized frontier (already sequenced), never parallel legs. n3-engine writes mostly-disjoint NEW files but touches package.json ‚Üí joins the serial order for that file. BYTE-MIRROR INVARIANT: plugins/kaola-workflow/scripts/validate-workflow-contracts.js MUST stay byte-identical to scripts/validate-workflow-contracts.js (edit both identically in the same node; validate-script-sync.js in claude+codex chains fails on divergence). #307: four chains sequential+recorded green before finalize; opencode unaffected.
